title: Embarcation
content:
(Southampton Docks: October, 1899)



    Here, where Vespasian's legions struck the sands,
    And Cerdic with his Saxons entered in,
    And Henry's army leapt afloat to win
    Convincing triumphs over neighbour lands,

    Vaster battalions press for further strands,
    To argue in the self-same bloody mode
    Which this late age of thought, and pact, and code,
    Still fails to mend. - Now deckward tramp the bands,
    Yellow as autumn leaves, alive as spring;
    And as each host draws out upon the sea
    Beyond which lies the tragical To-be,
    None dubious of the cause, none murmuring,

    Wives, sisters, parents, wave white hands and smile,
    As if they knew not that they weep the while.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Thomas Hardy delivers a powerful performance in "Embarcation"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
